item.dc:creator: Fi5Hwifecruse143

item.title: Let’s not go backwards
item.description: I understand that Putin is homophobic and that calling him gay would be offensive to him. But it’s taking us back to a time when “gay” was an insult, and it’s sending the message that being gay is something shameful or worth being hated for. There are PLENTY of reasons to shit on Putin without insulting an already-marginalized population. *steps off soapbox* Edit: Did you all just… miss the first sentence of what I wrote? Edit 2: I want to remind everyone that Putin won’t see your posts on here. But young gay kids might. Having grown up in an environment where people WERE insulted to be called gay, I took a long time to realize that it wasn’t a character flaw and that I wasn’t worth less because of it. Of all the decorations in my class, the one that gets the most comments is my Pride flag, and kids literally come to me for advice/ validation. This stuff about “LGBT folks are fine with it” isn’t accurate. Just because you are, it doesn’t mean everyone is. #standwithukraine #fuckputin #lgbt
item.dc:creator: ptothedubs

item.title: Hey. We're having chocolate chip pancakes. Come on over, rest a while.
item.description: Tiny octopus wishes he could make pancakes for anyone who wanted them. Today especially. Normally it would be waffles, but there was an ice storm last night, so it's a pancake sort of morning. Be well everyone. Choose kindness.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: 80-year-old showed up to join the army, carrying with him a small case with 2 tshirts, a pair of extra pants, a toothbrush and a few sandwiches for lunch. He said he was doing it for his grandkids.
item.dc:creator: yougotjamed

item.title: Welp
item.description: No pun intended but I hope this dies in usersub. I don't want much. I'm just trying to take the first step to be able to say this out loud. Last November I was home alone on my day off. I took a rope that my husband bought for shibari, walked into the garage, tied it to the top of our work out rack (it is bolted into the wall so it is really sturdy), and almost went down the sewerslide. My saving grace was that I couldn't figure out how long the rope needed to be so I jumped up to do a dead hang (again, no pun intended) from the top of the rack to estimate how much I would need. As I was hanging by my arms the gym equipment, tools, scrap wood, law mower, and everything in the garage transformed into visions of my husband, our daughter, our son, my best friend who was getting engaged the upcoming weekend, my family and all the things I was about to say bye to. I let go of the bar and just hit the ground. I laid there for a few hours just crying and thinking of how I was about to leave my husband alone to face what I couldn't handle even as a two-person team. I thought about my children coming home from school and my curious daughter being the one to see me first. The chaos and pain I was about to unleash. The trauma I was about to make. And I was so angry that I couldn't think of all these reasons not to do it BEFORE. I got myself up. Put everything as I found it. Took a shower. And moved on. But the more I pretend nothing happened the more guilt I feel. No need to worry about me today. I did go to the doctor and I have antidepressants that seem to be working. I'm not perfect but I'm working on it and doing better. I'm just venting here because this knowledge is a weight on my heart but I can't bring myself to say the words out loud yet. Once I can face the situation I will get some more peace. I'm just not ready. Vent here, say it out loud alone, then admit it to someone. Thanks for listening. National Suicide Hotline: 800-273-8255
item.dc:creator: jauntyseapearl

item.dc:creator: Thryloz

item.title: In light of that stupid bill passing
item.description: I’m a true southern boy. I grew up in Tennessee and came down to Florida after I got out of the army. At one point in time I even had a Dixie flag tattoo. I’ve since had it blacked out. I drive a F-250. I spend most of my time working a ranch. And I still think gay rights are important. If someone like me can change to be accepting and loving of everyone despite my upbringing and all I’ve been through, than so can you.
item.dc:creator: humanpandas

item.title: A collection of the strange and unusual mushroom and fungi species.
item.description:
Dead Man’s Fingers (Xylaria polymorpha)
Brain fungus
Indigo Milk Cap (Lactarius indigo)
Bleeding Tooth (Hydnellum peckii)
Jelly ear mushroom
Clathrus Archerii
Phallaceae. Cardamom
Laternea pusilla
Mycena manipularis
Purple Jellydisc (Ascocoryne sarcoides)
geastrum britannicum
Macroybe titan
Devil’s Fingers Mushroom
Bird's Nest Fungi
Trichoglossum hirsutum Earth tongues
Aseroe rubra Starfish Fungi
Ganoderma lucidum (Antlers)
Coprinopsis atramentaria
Plectania campylospora
Boletellus obscurecoccineus mushrooms
Clavulina amethystina
Veiled stinkhorn fungus
Cyttaria gunnii - Strawberry Fungi
Orange Tooth (Hydnellum floriforme)
amanita arkansana
Oligoporus ptychogaster Bunny ears
Sphaerobolus stellatus Sphere throwing Sphaerobolus
Tremella mesenterica witches butter

item.title: Assorted All Video Dump
item.description:
Howdy Imgurians! Wow. What a day huh? Crazy world. Crazy year so far. Here’s a dump to hopefully cheer you up, distract you, or otherwise take your mind off things. Enjoy the videos. Stay strong, stay safe.
#5
#10
#15 this video is a few years old, (all of these videos are) this is showing what Tesla Autopilot sees. I’m sure it’s different now.
#20
Whoa that’s close.
#25
#30
#35
#40
Wait for it
#45
Sneaky cat tax If you made it to the end, thank you very much for sticking around, I hope you enjoyed, and have a great rest of your day!
item.dc:creator: knowallknownothing

item.title: Day 273: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Aisle Nine Baconator Two 5oz Beef Patties, 2 Slices Of Cheddar, 4 Strips Of Thick Cut Applewood Smoked Bacon, Dill Pickles, Ketchup And Mayo, And Finished On A Charcoal Grill For That Outdoor Smokehouse Bbq From Aisle Nine Gourmet Burgers & Poutine In Greater Sudbury, ON, Canada Thank You @yodadude For This Burger Submission! 12/10! Previous Day 272: https://imgur.com/gallery/lUMqihi MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
